3070680.name: Chadgeon: Literally Me Expansion
3070680.description:
The Chadgeon: Literally Me Expansion unlocks 5 new maps for the base game themed around literally me characters.
Maps include:
- Wall Street Nest
- The Los Palomas Hermanos
- Gotham
- Ryan Gosling 2049
- Pigeonland

Note, These maps can also be played in the base game so long as the host has this expansion unlocked. Players that join the host will be able to play these maps for free without getting the expansion. You can also unlock these maps individually in the base game with Chad Coins. If you happen to already own some of the maps when you get this expansion you will gain 2000 Chad Coins for each map you already have unlocked
